name: apex
description: Turn a rough request into an elite, grounded, human-gated prompt for an agentic coding task. Kimi Code port of the apex prompting system.
skillInstructions: apex runs on Kimi Code's native tools. Mapping: when the orchestrator dispatches the context-scout subagent, call the `Agent` tool with `subagent_type: "explore"`; when it dispatches the red-team-critic subagent, call `Agent` with `subagent_type: "plan"`; in both cases first read the matching role file under the apex skill's `agents/` directory and prepend its (frontmatter-stripped) body to the dispatch prompt. Script calls use the `Bash` tool with `PYTHONPATH` set to the apex plugin root (`${KIMI_SKILL_DIR}/../..`, one level above `skills/`). Clarifying questions use `AskUserQuestion`. The generated prompt is never auto-run — it is presented behind a human gate.

interface.shortDescription: Elite, grounded, human-gated prompt builder for coding tasks.
interface.longDescription: Invoke /skill:apex "<rough idea>" to turn a rough request into a verified, grounded prompt. apex clarifies intent, grounds in the repo via a read-only scout, drafts against archetype templates, red-teams the draft against a falsifiable rubric, refines on blocking defects, and presents a human-gated result. Never executes the generated prompt itself.
